enrichment.summary: Kyle briefly vlogs from his Boulder home on May 28, 2014, describing a productive day working on his porch until 11pm on what appears to be a website project, mentioning his nearby work commute and morning oatmeal routine.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: finds it exciting and rewarding to make progress on projects

transcript.text: Living in Boulder Vlog for the, uh, yesterday would have been the 28th, um, I was, yeah, I didn't work, so I was out there on my, uh, porch all day long yesterday, uh, getting caught up, or not getting caught up, working until like 11, um, from like 9, I think, I actually started around 10 to 11, um, yeah, I did pretty well, I think I can finish that page.

Today, um, after work, I go to work really close to where I am now, so I'm not going to ride by, uh, my normal bicycle shoes, just my normal sneakers, and, um, they'll drop me off really close to my house, um, my oatmeal is cooking right now, so, um, yes, that's about what I did yesterday, it was exciting.
It's always exciting to get to the next level.
I'll explain all this stuff later, though, my new, all of this website stuff I'm doing, I'll probably have it all uploaded in a couple of months.
